title: Oligactis pichinchensis
taxonomy: Oligactis pichinchensis is classified in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Oligactis. The species is native to Peru. The classification further includes the kingdom Plantae and the class Magnoliopsida. Oligactis pichinchensis is a type of flowering plant.
